sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110962" key="fileu/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλ-εύδῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n110962.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving clear weather,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἀμφιτρίτα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Is.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">145</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
